# Exploratory Data Analysis Summary

## AI Trust & Safety Risk Triage — EDA Report

**Dataset:** data/synthetic_user_reports.csv
**Total records:** 500
**Generated by:** notebooks/02_exploratory_analysis.py

---

## Data Quality

| Check | Result |
|---|---|
| Total rows | 500 |
| Duplicate ticket IDs | 0 |
| Missing values | 0 |
| Date range | 2026-01-01 to 2026-06-18 |
| Unique risk categories | 10 |
| Unique subcategories | 30 |
| Unique escalation teams | 6 |

All fields are complete. No data quality issues identified.

---

## Risk Category Distribution

| Risk Category | Count | Percentage |
|---|---:|---:|
| Account abuse | 58 | 11.6% |
| Billing safety escalation | 42 | 8.4% |
| Child safety concern | 38 | 7.6% |
| Harassment | 62 | 12.4% |
| Misinformation | 51 | 10.2% |
| Platform integrity | 55 | 11.0% |
| Policy confusion | 47 | 9.4% |
| Privacy concern | 49 | 9.8% |
| Scam or fraud | 53 | 10.6% |
| Self-harm concern | 45 | 9.0% |

Harassment is the most common category (12.4%), followed by Account abuse (11.6%) and Platform integrity (11.0%).

---

## Severity Distribution

| Severity | Count | Percentage |
|---|---:|---:|
| Critical | 78 | 15.6% |
| High | 142 | 28.4% |
| Medium | 186 | 37.2% |
| Low | 94 | 18.8% |

Approximately 44% of tickets are High or Critical severity, indicating a significant human review burden.

---

## Human Review Requirement

| human_review_required | Count | Percentage |
|---|---:|---:|
| True | 247 | 49.4% |
| False | 253 | 50.6% |

Nearly half of all tickets require human review. Child safety, Self-harm, and Critical-severity tickets are always flagged for human review.

---

## Model Confidence Distribution

| Confidence Range | Count | Percentage |
|---|---:|---:|
| 0.90 – 1.00 | 143 | 28.6% |
| 0.75 – 0.89 | 218 | 43.6% |
| 0.60 – 0.74 | 101 | 20.2% |
| Below 0.60 | 38 | 7.6% |

Mean confidence: 0.79
Median confidence: 0.81
Tickets below 0.70 confidence: 62 (12.4%) — these are flagged for additional human oversight.

---

## Escalation Team Workload

| Escalation Team | Tickets Assigned |
|---|---:|
| Trust & Safety Review | 142 |
| Content Moderation | 118 |
| Fraud & Abuse Team | 95 |
| Child Safety Specialists | 38 |
| Legal & Compliance | 64 |
| Billing Operations | 43 |

Trust & Safety Review carries the highest volume. Child Safety Specialists handle the smallest but highest-severity queue.

---

## SLA Target Distribution

| SLA Target (hours) | Count | Percentage |
|---|---:|---:|
| 1 hour | 78 | 15.6% |
| 4 hours | 142 | 28.4% |
| 24 hours | 186 | 37.2% |
| 72 hours | 94 | 18.8% |

---

## Channel Distribution

| Channel | Count |
|---|---:|
| In-app report | 198 |
| Email | 124 |
| Web form | 97 |
| API | 81 |

In-app reporting is the dominant intake channel.

---

## Region Distribution

| Region | Count |
|---|---:|
| North America | 168 |
| Europe | 142 |
| Asia Pacific | 112 |
| Latin America | 48 |
| Middle East & Africa | 30 |

---

## Final Action Distribution

| Final Action | Count | Percentage |
|---|---:|---:|
| Escalate to specialist | 189 | 37.8% |
| Close with education | 112 | 22.4% |
| Monitor and log | 87 | 17.4% |
| Immediate action required | 78 | 15.6% |
| Refer to billing team | 34 | 6.8% |

---

## Key Findings

1. Nearly half of all tickets require human review — this is appropriate given the sensitive risk categories present.
2. Model confidence is generally high (mean 0.79) but 62 tickets fall below the 0.70 threshold, warranting additional scrutiny.
3. Critical and High severity tickets together account for 44% of volume — SLA pressure is significant.
4. Trust & Safety Review team handles the largest share of tickets and may benefit from prioritisation tooling.
5. Child Safety Specialists handle the fewest tickets but highest-stakes cases — capacity planning is essential.
6. In-app reporting is the primary intake channel, suggesting mobile triage tooling would have high impact.

---

## Output Files

This script produces the following outputs when run locally:

- reports/eda_summary.md (this file)
- images/eda_risk_category_distribution.png

*This report was generated from fully synthetic data. No real users, platforms, companies, accounts, or incidents are included.*
